subject: docs: mark EVENT_BUS as evaluated and skipped
body:
Reviewed budgy-ting's communication patterns against the glow-props
EVENT_BUS pattern. The app uses standard Vue emit() for parent-child,
storage events for cross-tab, DOM events for PWA, and debugLog's own
pub/sub. No service-layer pub/sub needs exist — no module copy-pastes
listener/emit boilerplate. EVENT_BUS pattern is not needed.

All glow-props patterns are now complete:
- CLAUDE.md align: done
- APP_ICONS: done (density 400, separate maskable)
- BURGER_MENU: done (arrow keys, z-index, theme toggle)
- DEBUG_SYSTEM: done (console interception, PWA tab, inline pill, circular buffer, DaisyUI migration)
- DOWNLOAD_PDF: done (Save as PDF button)
- PWA_SYSTEM: done (visibility checks, suppression, diagnostics)
- THEME_DARK_MODE: done (full DaisyUI migration)
- EVENT_BUS: evaluated, skipped (not needed)

Tags: docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: patch

title: mark EVENT_BUS as evaluated and skipped
